ABOUT US
Northstar Health uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to improve internal operations. Our company works across AWS and Azure, but this role is focused on a backend application team.

ABOUT THE ROLE
You will help build reliable services used by internal engineering teams.

WHAT YOU'LL DO
• Design and maintain RESTful services in Python.
• Deploy containerized applications and support PostgreSQL-backed systems.
• Write automated tests and participate in code review.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
• Strong SQL skills and experience using Git for version control.
• A bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
• 2+ years of software development experience.
• U.S. citizenship is required for access to restricted systems.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Exposure to AWS and Kubernetes is preferred.

BENEFITS
Medical coverage, paid time off, and professional development support.
